verses.latin_vulgate: Magnus Dominus et laudabilis nimis,  in civitate Dei nostri, in monte sancto ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גָּ֘ד֤וֹל יְהֹוָ֣ה וּמְהֻלָּ֣ל מְאֹ֑ד בְּעִ֥יר אֱ֝לֹהֵ֗ינוּ הַר־קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Great is the Lord, and exceedingly to be praised in the city of our God, in his holy mountain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koran lasten Veisu-Psalmi. (H48:2) Suuri on Herra, ja sangen kiitettävä, meidän Jumalamme kaupungissa, pyhällä vuorellansa.
verses.king_james: Great is the Lord, and greatly to be praised in the city of our God, in the mountain of his holiness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fundatur exsultatione universæ terræ mons Sion ;  latera aquilonis, civitas regis magni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְפֵ֥ה נוֹף֮ מְשׂ֢וֹשׂ כׇּל־הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ הַר־צִ֭יּוֹן יַרְכְּתֵ֣י צָפ֑וֹן קִ֝רְיַ֗ת מֶ֣לֶךְ רָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: With the joy of the whole earth is mount Sion founded, on the sides of the north, the city of the great king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Zionin vuori on kauniilla paikalla, koko maan ilo, pohjan puolella, suuren kuninkaan kaupunki.
verses.king_james: Beautiful for situation, the joy of the whole earth, is mount Zion, on the sides of the north, the city of the great King.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus in domibus ejus cognoscetur  cum suscipiet eam.
verses.douay_rheims: In her houses shall God be known, when he shall protect her.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala on tunnettu huoneessansa, että hän sen varjelia on.
verses.king_james: God is known in her palaces for a refuge.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ecce reges terræ congregati sunt ;  convenerunt in unum.
verses.douay_rheims: For behold the kings of the earth assembled themselves: they gathered together.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä katso, kuninkaat olivat kokoontuneet, ja ynnä menivät ohitse.
verses.king_james: For, lo, the kings were assembled, they passed by together.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsi videntes, sic admirati sunt,  conturbati sunt, commoti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֣מָּה רָ֭אוּ כֵּ֣ן תָּמָ֑הוּ נִבְהֲל֥וּ נֶחְפָּֽזוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: So they saw, and they wondered, they were troubled, they were moved:
verses.finnish_biblia: He ihmettelivät, kuin he tämän näkivät: he hämmästyivät, ja kiiruhtivat pois,
verses.king_james: They saw it, and so they marvelled; they were troubled, and hasted away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tremor apprehendit eos ;  ibi dolores ut parturientis :
verses.douay_rheims: Trembling took hold of them. There were pains as of a woman in labour.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vavistus on heidät siellä käsittänyt, ahdistus niinkuin synnyttäväisen.
verses.king_james: Fear took hold upon them there, and pain, as of a woman in travail.

verses.latin_vulgate: in spiritu vehementi conteres naves Tharsis.
verses.douay_rheims: With a vehement wind thou shalt break in pieces the ships of Tharsis.
verses.king_james: Thou breakest the ships of Tarshish with an east wind.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut audivimus, sic vidimus,  in civitate Domini virtutum, in civitate Dei nostri :  Deus fundavit eam in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר שָׁמַ֨עְנוּ ׀ כֵּ֤ן רָאִ֗ינוּ בְּעִיר־יְהֹוָ֣ה צְ֭בָאוֹת בְּעִ֣יר אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ אֱלֹ֘הִ֤ים יְכוֹנְנֶ֖הָ עַד־עוֹלָ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: As we have heard, so have we seen, in the city of the Lord of hosts, in the city of our God: God hath founded it for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin me kuulimme, niin me sen näemme Herran Zebaotin kaupungissa, meidän Jumalamme kaupungissa: Jumala sen vahvistaa ijankaikkisesti, Sela!
verses.king_james: As we have heard, so have we seen in the city of the Lord of hosts, in the city of our God: God will establish it for ever. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscepimus, Deus, misericordiam tuam  in medio templi tui.
verses.douay_rheims: We have received thy mercy, O God, in the midst of thy temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala! me odotamme sinun hyvyyttäs sinun templissäs.
verses.king_james: We have thought of thy lovingkindness, O God, in the midst of thy temple.

verses.latin_vulgate: Secundum nomen tuum, Deus,  sic et laus tua in fines terræ ;  justitia plena est dextera tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּשִׁמְךָ֤ אֱלֹהִ֗ים כֵּ֣ן תְּ֭הִלָּתְךָ עַל־קַצְוֵי־אֶ֑רֶץ צֶ֝֗דֶק מָלְאָ֥ה יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: According to thy name, O God, so also is thy praise unto the ends of the earth: thy right hand is full of justice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala! niinkuin sinun nimes on, niin myös on sinun kiitokses hamaan maailman ääreen: sinun oikia kätes on täynnä vanhurskautta.
verses.king_james: According to thy name, O God, so is thy praise unto the ends of the earth: thy right hand is full of righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætetur mons Sion,  et exsultent filiæ Judæ,  propter judicia tua, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׂמַ֤ח ׀ הַר־צִיּ֗וֹן תָּ֭גֵלְנָה בְּנ֣וֹת יְהוּדָ֑ה לְ֝מַ֗עַן מִשְׁפָּטֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let mount Sion rejoice, and the daughters of Juda be glad; because of thy judgments, O Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Riemuitkaan Zionin vuori, ja Juudan tyttäret iloitkaan sinun oikeuttes tähden.
verses.king_james: Let mount Zion rejoice, let the daughters of Judah be glad, because of thy judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdate Sion, et complectimini eam ;  narrate in turribus ejus.
verses.douay_rheims: Surround Sion, and encompass her: tell ye in her towers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Menkäät Zionin ympäri ja piirittäkäät häntä: lukekaat hänen torninsa.
verses.king_james: Walk about Zion, and go round about her: tell the towers thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ponite corda vestra in virtute ejus,  et distribuite domos ejus, ut enarretis in progenie altera.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֤יתוּ לִבְּכֶ֨ם ׀ לְֽחֵילָ֗הֿ פַּסְּג֥וּ אַרְמְנוֹתֶ֑יהָ לְמַ֥עַן תְּ֝סַפְּר֗וּ לְד֣וֹר אַחֲרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Set your hearts on her strength; and distribute her houses, that ye may relate it in another generation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Turvatkaat hänen muurinsa, vahvistakaat hänen salinsa, että te sitä juttelisitte tulevaisille sukukunnille.
verses.king_james: Mark ye well her bulwarks, consider her palaces; that ye may tell it to the generation following.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam hic est Deus,  Deus noster in æternum, et in sæculum sæculi :  ipse reget nos in sæcula.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י זֶ֨ה ׀ אֱלֹהִ֣ים אֱ֭לֹהֵינוּ עוֹלָ֣ם וָעֶ֑ד ה֖וּא יְנַהֲגֵ֣נוּ עַל־מֽוּת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For this is God, our God unto eternity, and for ever and ever: he shall rule us for evermore.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä tämä Jumala on meidän Jumalamme aina ja ijankaikkisesti: hän johdattaa meitä kuolemaan asti.
verses.king_james: For this God is our God for ever and ever: he will be our guide even unto death.
